_comment: Example projects.json for a short-drama (竖屏短剧) screenwriting product. Copy a block into your real projects.json. Screenwriting is a non-code project: build/deploy/ops/repos are omitted; the 'repo' is the series dir holding bible.md/characters.csv/grid.csv/episodes/. Agents: story-architect (=senior-dev tier) + screenwriter (=junior-dev tier) + reflect + sweep; the human showrunner is the pm pane (taste verifier).

testEnv.notes: There is no web surface. 'Testing' an episode = the dramalint structural gate (hook/length/name/paywall hard gates + 爽点/双供给/伏笔 flag-only warns). Taste is the human showrunner's call at In Review, never an agent's.

projects._service_variant_note: On backend:'service' instead of 'local': set hub:{db:null,docs:true,transport:'daemon'}, strategyDoc:{hubDoc:'strategy'} (bible as a hub strategy doc, operator-publishes), and beat-sheets as design docs (Design: hubDoc:design/beats-<arc>). The dev-tier is then the ticket assignee (senior-dev/junior-dev actors) rather than a label. Run `dev-loop init-service hidden-heir "Hidden Heir" SD` first.
